items.name: Guidance Dua
items.ar: اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ
items.tr: Ihdinas-siratal-mustaqim
items.en: Guide us to the straight path.

items.name: Acceptance of Deeds
items.ar: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
items.tr: Rabbana taqabbal minna, innaka Antas-Sami‘ul-‘Alim
items.en: Our Lord, accept from us. Surely, Allah is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

items.name: Submission to Allah
items.ar: رَبَّنَا وَاجْعَلْنَا مُسْلِمَيْنِ لَكَ، وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِنَا أُمَّةً مُسْلِمَةً لَكَ
items.tr: Rabbana waj‘alna muslimayni laka, wa min dhurriyyatina ummatan muslimatan laka
items.en: Our Lord, make us submissive to Allah and from our offspring a nation submissive to Allah.

items.name: Good in This World and Hereafter
items.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً، وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً، وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
items.tr: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanah, wa fil-akhirati hasanah, wa qina ‘adhaban-nar
items.en: Our Lord, grant good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect from the punishment of the Fire.

items.name: Patience and Firmness
items.ar: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا، وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا، وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana afrigh ‘alayna sabran, wa thabbit aqdamana, wansurna ‘alal-qawmil-kafirin
items.en: Our Lord, pour patience upon us, make our feet firm, and grant victory over the disbelieving people.

items.name: Pardon, Forgiveness and Mercy
items.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا، رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا، رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ، وَاعْفُ عَنَّا، وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا، وَارْحَمْنَا، أَنْتَ مَوْلَانَا، فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana la tuakhidhna in nasina aw akhta’na. Rabbana wa la tahmil alayna isran kama hamaltahu alalladhina min qablina. Rabbana wa la tuhammilna ma la taqata lana bih. Wa‘fu ‘anna, waghfir lana, warhamna. Anta mawlana fansurna ‘alal-qawmil-kafirin.
items.en: Our Lord, do not take us to task if forgetfulness or error occurs. Do not place upon us a burden like that placed upon those before us. Do not burden us beyond strength. Pardon us, forgive us, and have mercy on us. You are our Protector, so grant victory over the disbelieving people.
items.note: Complete Quran 2:286 supplication retained from prior verified correction.

items.name: Protection from Deviation
items.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا، وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
items.tr: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana ba‘da idh hadaytana, wa hab lana min ladunka rahmah, innaka Antal-Wahhab
items.en: Our Lord, do not let hearts deviate after guidance, and grant mercy from Allah.

items.name: Forgiveness and Protection from Fire
items.ar: رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا آمَنَّا، فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا، وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
items.tr: Rabbana innana amanna, faghfir lana dhunubana, wa qina ‘adhaban-nar
items.en: Our Lord, indeed faith has been accepted, so forgive sins and protect from the punishment of the Fire.

items.name: Righteous Offspring
items.ar: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً، إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
items.tr: Rabbi hab li min ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibah, innaka Sami‘ud-du‘a
items.en: My Lord, grant good offspring from Allah; surely, Allah hears supplication.

items.name: Forgiveness and Firmness
items.ar: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا، وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا، وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا، وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana-ghfir lana dhunubana, wa israfana fi amrina, wa thabbit aqdamana, wansurna ‘alal-qawmil-kafirin
items.en: Our Lord, forgive sins and excesses, make feet firm, and grant victory.

items.name: Forgiveness and Good Ending
items.ar: رَبَّنَا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا، وَكَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئَاتِنَا، وَتَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الْأَبْرَارِ
items.tr: Rabbana faghfir lana dhunubana, wa kaffir ‘anna sayyi’atina, wa tawaffana ma‘al-abrar
items.en: Our Lord, forgive sins, remove misdeeds, and grant death among the righteous.

items.name: Promise of Reward
items.ar: رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا عَلَى رُسُلِكَ، وَلَا تُخْزِنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ، إِنَّكَ لَا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ
items.tr: Rabbana wa atina ma wa‘adtana ‘ala rusulika, wa la tukhzina yawmal-qiyamah, innaka la tukhliful-mi‘ad
items.en: Our Lord, grant what was promised through the messengers and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection.

items.name: Written Among Witnesses
items.ar: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا، فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana amanna, faktubna ma‘ash-shahidin
items.en: Our Lord, faith has been accepted, so record us among the witnesses.

items.name: Sustenance from Allah
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا أَنْزِلْ عَلَيْنَا مَائِدَةً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ، تَكُونُ لَنَا عِيدًا لِأَوَّلِنَا وَآخِرِنَا، وَآيَةً مِنْكَ، وَارْزُقْنَا، وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ
items.tr: Allahumma Rabbana anzil ‘alayna ma’idatan minas-sama’i, takunu lana ‘idan li-awwalina wa akhirina, wa ayatan minka, warzuqna, wa Anta Khayrur-Raziqin
items.en: O Allah, our Lord, send down provision from the sky and provide for us; Allah is the best provider.

items.name: Forgiveness After Wrongdoing
items.ar: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا، وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا، لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana zalamna anfusana, wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna, lanakunanna minal-khasirin
items.en: Our Lord, wrong has been done to the self; without forgiveness and mercy, loss will follow.

items.name: Protection from Wrongdoers
items.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana la taj‘alna ma‘al-qawmiz-zalimin
items.en: Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people.

items.name: Judgment with Truth
items.ar: رَبَّنَا افْتَحْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ قَوْمِنَا بِالْحَقِّ، وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْفَاتِحِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana-ftah baynana wa bayna qawmina bil-haqq, wa Anta Khayrul-Fatihin
items.en: Our Lord, judge between us and our people with truth; Allah is the best judge.

items.name: Patience and Death upon Islam
items.ar: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا، وَتَوَفَّنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana afrigh ‘alayna sabran, wa tawaffana muslimin
items.en: Our Lord, pour patience upon us and cause death in submission to Allah.

items.name: Forgiveness for Self and Brother
items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِأَخِي، وَأَدْخِلْنَا فِي رَحْمَتِكَ، وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbighfir li wa li akhi, wa adkhilna fi rahmatika, wa Anta Arhamur-Rahimin
items.en: My Lord, forgive me and my brother, and admit us into mercy.

items.name: Reliance on Allah
items.ar: رَبَّنَا عَلَى اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا، رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِلْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana ‘alallahi tawakkalna, Rabbana la taj‘alna fitnatan lil-qawmiz-zalimin
items.en: Our Lord, upon Allah is reliance; do not make us a trial for wrongdoing people.

items.name: Rescue from Wrongdoers
items.ar: وَنَجِّنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.tr: Wa najjina birahmatika minal-qawmil-kafirin
items.en: Rescue us by Allah’s mercy from the disbelieving people.

items.name: Protection from Ignorant Request
items.ar: رَبِّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَسْأَلَكَ مَا لَيْسَ لِي بِهِ عِلْمٌ، وَإِلَّا تَغْفِرْ لِي وَتَرْحَمْنِي، أَكُنْ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi inni a‘udhu bika an as’alaka ma laysa li bihi ‘ilm, wa illa taghfir li wa tarhamni, akun minal-khasirin
items.en: My Lord, refuge is sought from asking without knowledge; without forgiveness and mercy, loss will follow.

items.name: Good Ending upon Islam
items.ar: فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، أَنْتَ وَلِيِّي فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ، تَوَفَّنِي مُسْلِمًا، وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
items.tr: Fatiras-samawati wal-ard, Anta waliyyi fid-dunya wal-akhirah, tawaffani musliman, wa alhiqni bis-salihin
items.en: Creator of the heavens and earth, Allah is the Protector in this world and the Hereafter; grant death as a Muslim and join with the righteous.

items.name: Safety and Protection from Idols
items.ar: رَبِّ اجْعَلْ هَذَا الْبَلَدَ آمِنًا، وَاجْنُبْنِي وَبَنِيَّ أَنْ نَعْبُدَ الْأَصْنَامَ
items.tr: Rabbij‘al hadhal-balada aminan, wajnubni wa baniyya an na‘budal-asnam
items.en: My Lord, make this land safe and keep me and my children away from worshipping idols.

items.name: Establishment of Salah
items.ar: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ، وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي، رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
items.tr: Rabbij‘alni muqimas-salati wa min dhurriyyati, Rabbana wa taqabbal du‘a
items.en: My Lord, make me and my offspring establish prayer, and accept supplication.

items.name: Forgiveness for Parents and Believers
items.ar: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي، وَلِوَالِدَيَّ، وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ، يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
items.tr: Rabbanaghfir li, wa liwalidayya, wa lil-mu’minina yawma yaqumul-hisab
items.en: Our Lord, forgive me, my parents, and the believers on the Day of Account.

items.name: Mercy for Parents
items.ar: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
items.tr: Rabbirhamhuma kama rabbayani saghira
items.en: My Lord, have mercy upon both parents as they raised me when young.

items.name: Truthful Entry and Exit
items.ar: رَبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍ، وَأَخْرِجْنِي مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍ، وَاجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَانًا نَصِيرًا
items.tr: Rabbi adkhilni mudkhala sidqin, wa akhrijni mukhraja sidqin, waj‘al li min ladunka sultanan nasira
items.en: My Lord, grant truthful entry and truthful exit, and grant supporting authority from Allah.

items.name: Mercy and Right Guidance
items.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً، وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
items.tr: Rabbana atina min ladunka rahmah, wa hayyi’ lana min amrina rashada
items.en: Our Lord, grant mercy from Allah and prepare right guidance in affairs.

items.name: Expansion of Chest and Ease
items.ar: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي، وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي، وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِنْ لِسَانِي، يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
items.tr: Rabbishrah li sadri, wa yassir li amri, wahlul ‘uqdatan min lisani, yafqahu qawli
items.en: My Lord, expand my chest, ease my task, and untie the knot from my tongue so speech may be understood.

items.name: Increase in Knowledge
items.ar: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
items.tr: Rabbi zidni ‘ilma
items.en: My Lord, increase knowledge.

items.name: Dua of Ayyub
items.ar: رَبِّ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ، وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi anni massaniyad-durru, wa Anta Arhamur-Rahimin
items.en: My Lord, harm has touched me, and Allah is the Most Merciful of those who show mercy.

items.name: Dua of Yunus
items.ar: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، سُبْحَانَكَ، إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.tr: La ilaha illa Anta, subhanaka, inni kuntu minaz-zalimin
items.en: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah; glory be to Allah; wrongdoing is admitted.

items.name: Righteous Heir
items.ar: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا، وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi la tadharni fardan, wa Anta Khayrul-Warithin
items.en: My Lord, do not leave me alone, and Allah is the best of inheritors.

items.name: Victory After Rejection
items.ar: رَبِّ انْصُرْنِي بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
items.tr: Rabbinsurni bima kadhdhabun
items.en: My Lord, grant help because they have denied me.

items.name: Blessed Landing
items.ar: رَبِّ أَنْزِلْنِي مُنْزَلًا مُبَارَكًا، وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْمُنْزِلِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi anzilni munzalan mubarakan, wa Anta Khayrul-Munzilin
items.en: My Lord, cause me to land at a blessed place; Allah is the best to settle.

items.name: Protection from Shaytan
items.ar: رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ
items.tr: Rabbi a‘udhu bika min hamazatish-shayatin, wa a‘udhu bika Rabbi an yahdurun
items.en: My Lord, refuge is sought from the whispers of devils and from their presence.

items.name: Forgiveness and Mercy
items.ar: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا، فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا، وَارْحَمْنَا، وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbana amanna, faghfir lana, warhamna, wa Anta Khayrur-Rahimin
items.en: Our Lord, faith has been accepted, so forgive and have mercy; Allah is the best of those who show mercy.

items.name: Short Forgiveness Dua
items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ، وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbighfir warham, wa Anta Khayrur-Rahimin
items.en: My Lord, forgive and have mercy; Allah is the best of those who show mercy.

items.name: Protection from Hellfire
items.ar: رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ، إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
items.tr: Rabbana-srif ‘anna ‘adhaba Jahannam, inna ‘adhabaha kana gharama
items.en: Our Lord, turn away from us the punishment of Hell; its punishment is severe.

items.name: Righteous Family
items.ar: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ، وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
items.tr: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a‘yun, waj‘alna lil-muttaqina imama
items.en: Our Lord, grant from spouses and offspring comfort of eyes, and make us leaders for the righteous.

items.name: Wisdom and Righteous Company
items.ar: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا، وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi hab li hukman, wa alhiqni bis-salihin
items.en: My Lord, grant wisdom and join me with the righteous.

items.name: Honourable Mention
items.ar: وَاجْعَلْ لِي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْآخِرِينَ
items.tr: Waj‘al li lisana sidqin fil-akhirin
items.en: Grant me an honourable mention among later generations.

items.name: Inheritance of Paradise
items.ar: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ النَّعِيمِ
items.tr: Waj‘alni min warathati jannatin-na‘im
items.en: Make me among the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss.

items.name: Gratitude and Righteous Deeds
items.ar: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ، وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ، وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ، وَأَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi awzi‘ni an ashkura ni‘matakallati an‘amta ‘alayya wa ‘ala walidayya, wa an a‘mala salihan tardah, wa adkhilni birahmatika fi ‘ibadikas-salihin
items.en: My Lord, enable gratitude for Allah’s favour, righteous deeds pleasing to Allah, and admission among righteous servants.

items.name: Forgiveness After Wrongdoing
items.ar: رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي
items.tr: Rabbi inni zalamtu nafsi faghfir li
items.en: My Lord, wrong has been done to the self, so forgive me.

items.name: Rescue from Wrongdoers
items.ar: رَبِّ نَجِّنِي مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi najjini minal-qawmiz-zalimin
items.en: My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people.

items.name: Need of Good Provision
items.ar: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
items.tr: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir
items.en: My Lord, surely I am in need of whatever good Allah sends down.

items.name: Help Against Corruption
items.ar: رَبِّ انْصُرْنِي عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْمُفْسِدِينَ
items.tr: Rabbinsurni ‘alal-qawmil-mufsidin
items.en: My Lord, grant help against the corrupting people.

items.name: Righteous Child
items.ar: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi hab li minas-salihin
items.en: My Lord, grant me a righteous child.

items.name: Forgiveness and Unique Grant
items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَهَبْ لِي مُلْكًا لَا يَنْبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِي، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
items.tr: Rabbighfir li, wa hab li mulkan la yanbaghi li ahadin min ba‘di, innaka Antal-Wahhab
items.en: My Lord, forgive me and grant a kingdom unlike any after me; Allah is the Bestower.

items.name: Forgiveness for Believers
items.ar: رَبَّنَا وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَةً وَعِلْمًا، فَاغْفِرْ لِلَّذِينَ تَابُوا، وَاتَّبَعُوا سَبِيلَكَ، وَقِهِمْ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ
items.tr: Rabbana wasi‘ta kulla shay’in rahmatan wa ‘ilma, faghfir lilladhina tabu wattaba‘u sabilaka, wa qihim ‘adhabal-jahim
items.en: Our Lord, Allah encompasses all things in mercy and knowledge; forgive those who repent and follow Allah’s path.

items.name: Admission into Paradise
items.ar: رَبَّنَا وَأَدْخِلْهُمْ جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدْتَهُمْ، وَمَنْ صَلَحَ مِنْ آبَائِهِمْ، وَأَزْوَاجِهِمْ، وَذُرِّيَّاتِهِمْ، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
items.tr: Rabbana wa adkhilhum jannati ‘adninillati wa‘adtahum, wa man salaha min aba’ihim wa azwajihim wa dhurriyyatihim, innaka Antal-‘Azizul-Hakim
items.en: Our Lord, admit them into eternal gardens promised to them and the righteous among their families.

items.name: Protection from Evil
items.ar: وَقِهِمُ السَّيِّئَاتِ، وَمَنْ تَقِ السَّيِّئَاتِ يَوْمَئِذٍ، فَقَدْ رَحِمْتَهُ، وَذَٰلِكَ هُوَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ
items.tr: Wa qihimus-sayyi’at, wa man taqis-sayyi’ati yawma’idhin faqad rahimtah, wa dhalika huwal-fawzul-‘azim
items.en: Protect them from evil deeds; whoever is protected that Day has received mercy and great success.

items.name: Gratitude and Righteous Offspring
items.ar: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ، وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ، وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِي، إِنِّي تُبْتُ إِلَيْكَ، وَإِنِّي مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbi awzi‘ni an ashkura ni‘matakallati an‘amta ‘alayya wa ‘ala walidayya, wa an a‘mala salihan tardah, wa aslih li fi dhurriyyati, inni tubtu ilayka wa inni minal-muslimin
items.en: My Lord, enable gratitude, righteous deeds, and righteousness in offspring; repentance is made to Allah.

items.name: Forgiveness for Earlier Believers
items.ar: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا، وَلِإِخْوَانِنَا الَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِالْإِيمَانِ، وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِي قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا، رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ
items.tr: Rabbanaghfir lana, wa li-ikhwaninalladhina sabaquna bil-iman, wa la taj‘al fi qulubina ghillan lilladhina amanu, Rabbana innaka Ra’ufur-Rahim
items.en: Our Lord, forgive us and earlier believers, and remove rancour from hearts toward the believers.

items.name: Trust, Repentance and Return
items.ar: رَبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا، وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا، وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
items.tr: Rabbana ‘alayka tawakkalna, wa ilayka anabna, wa ilaykal-masir
items.en: Our Lord, reliance is upon Allah, repentance is to Allah, and return is to Allah.

items.name: Protection from Trial
items.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا، وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَا، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
items.tr: Rabbana la taj‘alna fitnatan lilladhina kafaru, waghfir lana Rabbana, innaka Antal-‘Azizul-Hakim
items.en: Our Lord, do not make us a trial for disbelievers, and forgive us.

items.name: Completion of Light
items.ar: رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا، وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا، إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.tr: Rabbana atmim lana nurana, waghfir lana, innaka ‘ala kulli shay’in qadir
items.en: Our Lord, complete our light and forgive us; Allah has power over all things.

items.name: House Near Allah in Paradise
items.ar: رَبِّ ابْنِ لِي عِنْدَكَ بَيْتًا فِي الْجَنَّةِ، وَنَجِّنِي مِنْ فِرْعَوْنَ وَعَمَلِهِ، وَنَجِّنِي مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.tr: Rabbibni li ‘indaka baytan fil-jannah, wa najjini min Fir‘awna wa ‘amalih, wa najjini minal-qawmiz-zalimin
items.en: My Lord, build for me a house near Allah in Paradise, and save me from Pharaoh and the wrongdoing people.

items.name: Forgiveness for Believers
items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَلِوَالِدَيَّ، وَلِمَنْ دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا، وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
items.tr: Rabbighfir li, wa liwalidayya, wa liman dakhala baytiya mu’minan, wa lil-mu’minina wal-mu’minat
items.en: My Lord, forgive me, my parents, whoever enters my house as a believer, and believing men and women.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي، فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي، وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي، ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي، فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي، وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ، وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ، ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
items.tr: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi ilmika...
items.en: O Allah, guidance is sought through Your knowledge, power is sought through Your power, and Your great bounty is asked. If this matter is good, decree it, make it easy, and bless it. If it is harmful, turn it away and decree what is good.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى، وَالتُّقَى، وَالْعَفَافَ، وَالْغِنَى
items.tr: Allahumma inni as’alukal-huda wat-tuqa wal-afafa wal-ghina.
items.en: O Allah, guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency are asked from You.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ لِي دِينِيَ الَّذِي هُوَ عِصْمَةُ أَمْرِي، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي دُنْيَايَ الَّتِي فِيهَا مَعَاشِي، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي آخِرَتِيَ الَّتِي فِيهَا مَعَادِي، وَاجْعَلِ الْحَيَاةَ زِيَادَةً لِي فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ، وَاجْعَلِ الْمَوْتَ رَاحَةً لِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ
items.tr: Allahumma aslih li diniyal-ladhi huwa ismatu amri...
items.en: O Allah, set right my religion, my worldly life, and my Hereafter. Make life an increase in every good and death a relief from every evil.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ، مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ
items.tr: Allahumma inni as’aluka minal-khayri kullihi...
items.en: O Allah, all good is asked from You, immediate and future, what is known and what is not known.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
items.tr: Allahumma inni as’alukal-jannata wa a’udhu bika minan-nar.
items.en: O Allah, Paradise is asked from You, and refuge is sought in You from the Fire.

categories.label: Istighfar & Forgiveness Duas

items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
items.tr: Rabbighfir li wa tub alayya innaka antat-Tawwabur-Rahim.
items.en: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Surely You are the Accepter of repentance, the Most Merciful.
items.name: Istighfar in Sitting
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ، وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
items.tr: Astaghfirullahal-ladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum wa atubu ilayh.
items.en: Forgiveness is sought from Allah, besides whom there is none worthy of worship, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer, and repentance is made to Him.
items.name: Istighfar with Al-Hayy Al-Qayyum
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
items.tr: Allahummaghfir li dhanbi kullah, diqqahu wa jillah...
items.en: O Allah, forgive all my sins: small and great, first and last, public and private.
items.name: Forgiveness of All Sins
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Istighfar with Tawbah
items.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
items.tr: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayh.
items.en: I seek forgiveness from Allah and turn to Him in repentance.
items.src: Sahih al-Bukhari 6307; agreed meaning in Bukhari and Muslim narrations
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Dua Taught to Abu Bakr
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا، وَلَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَارْحَمْنِي، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
items.tr: Allahumma inni zalamtu nafsi zulman kathiran, wa la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta, faghfir li maghfiratan min indika, warhamni, innaka Antal-Ghafurur-Rahim.
items.en: O Allah, I have greatly wronged myself, and none forgives sins except You. Grant me forgiveness from Yourself and have mercy on me. Indeed, You are the Forgiving, the Merciful.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Complete Forgiveness Dua
items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي خَطِيئَتِي وَجَهْلِي وَإِسْرَافِي فِي أَمْرِي كُلِّهِ، وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي خَطَايَايَ وَعَمْدِي وَجَهْلِي وَهَزْلِي، وَكُلُّ ذَلِكَ عِنْدِي، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ، أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ، وَأَنْتَ الْمُؤَخِّرُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.tr: Rabbighfir li khati’ati wa jahli wa israfi fi amri kullihi, wa ma Anta a’lamu bihi minni. Allahummaghfir li khatayaya wa amdi wa jahli wa hazli, wa kullu dhalika indi. Allahummaghfir li ma qaddamtu wa ma akhkhartu, wa ma asrartu wa ma a’lantu. Antal-Muqaddimu wa Antal-Mu’akhkhiru, wa Anta ala kulli shay’in qadir.
items.en: My Lord, forgive my mistakes, ignorance, excess in all affairs, and what You know better than me. O Allah, forgive my errors, intentional sins, ignorance, joking, earlier and later sins, hidden and open sins. You bring forward and delay, and You are able over all things.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Ruku and Sujood Istighfar
items.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي
items.tr: Subhanakallahumma Rabbana wa bihamdika, Allahummaghfir li.
items.en: Glory is Yours, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is Yours. O Allah, forgive me.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Between Two Sujood
items.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
items.tr: Rabbighfir li, Rabbighfir li.
items.en: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.
items.src: Hisn al-Muslim 48; Sunan Ibn Majah 897; Abu Dawud 1/231 reference
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Between Two Sujood Longer Form
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَاهْدِنِي، وَعَافِنِي، وَارْزُقْنِي
items.tr: Allahummaghfir li, warhamni, wahdini, wa afini, warzuqni.
items.en: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, grant me wellbeing, and provide for me.
items.src: Bulugh al-Maram 188; Abu Dawud wording; Al-Hakim graded Sahih
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: General Forgiveness and Mercy
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَعَافِنِي، وَارْزُقْنِي
items.tr: Allahummaghfir li, warhamni, wa afini, warzuqni.
items.en: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, grant me wellbeing, and provide for me.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Afw and Afiyah
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
items.tr: Allahumma inni as’alukal-afwa wal-afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah.
items.en: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and wellbeing in this world and the Hereafter.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Laylatul Qadr Dua
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
items.tr: Allahumma innaka Afuwwun tuhibbul-afwa fa’fu anni.
items.en: O Allah, You are Pardoning and love pardon, so pardon me.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Night Waking Forgiveness Dua
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي
items.tr: Allahummaghfir li.
items.en: O Allah, forgive me.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

categories.subtitle: verified Istighfar, Tawbah, and forgiveness supplications

items.name: Salat Ibrahimiyyah
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ، اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
items.tr: Allahumma salli ala Muhammadin wa ala aali Muhammadin, kama sallayta ala aali Ibrahima, innaka Hamidun Majid. Allahumma barik ala Muhammadin wa ala aali Muhammadin, kama barakta ala aali Ibrahima, innaka Hamidun Majid.
items.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, as blessings were sent upon the family of Ibrahim. Surely, Allah is Praiseworthy, Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as the family of Ibrahim was blessed.
items.timing: In Salah after tashahhud and general Salawat

items.name: Full Salat Ibrahimiyyah with Ibrahim and His Family
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ، اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
items.tr: Allahumma salli ala Muhammadin wa ala aali Muhammadin, kama sallayta ala Ibrahima wa ala aali Ibrahima, innaka Hamidun Majid. Allahumma barik ala Muhammadin wa ala aali Muhammadin, kama barakta ala Ibrahima wa ala aali Ibrahima, innaka Hamidun Majid.
items.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as blessings were sent upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim were blessed.
items.timing: In Salah after tashahhud and general Salawat

items.name: Salawat upon Muhammad, Allah’s Servant and Messenger
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
items.tr: Allahumma salli ala Muhammadin abdika wa rasulika, kama sallayta ala aali Ibrahima, wa barik ala Muhammadin wa ala aali Muhammadin, kama barakta ala aali Ibrahima.
items.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad, Allah’s servant and messenger, as blessings were sent upon the family of Ibrahim; and bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as the family of Ibrahim was blessed.
items.timing: General Salawat; reported wording for invoking blessings upon the Prophet ﷺ

items.name: Salawat upon the Prophet’s Wives and Offspring
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَأَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ، وَأَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
items.tr: Allahumma salli ala Muhammadin wa azwajihi wa dhurriyyatihi, kama sallayta ala aali Ibrahima, wa barik ala Muhammadin wa azwajihi wa dhurriyyatihi, kama barakta ala aali Ibrahima, innaka Hamidun Majid.
items.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad, the Prophet’s wives, and the Prophet’s offspring, as blessings were sent upon the family of Ibrahim; and bless Muhammad, the Prophet’s wives, and the Prophet’s offspring, as the family of Ibrahim was blessed.
items.timing: General Salawat; reported wording for invoking blessings upon the Prophet ﷺ

items.name: Short Salawat with Salam
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
items.tr: Allahumma salli wa sallim ala nabiyyina Muhammad.
items.en: O Allah, send blessings and peace upon Prophet Muhammad.
items.src: Hisn al-Muslim 98; At-Tabarani with reliable chain noted in Hisn al-Muslim
items.grade: Jayyid chain noted in Hisn al-Muslim
items.rep: 10 times in the morning and 10 times in the evening

items.name: Salawat before Dua
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ
items.tr: Allahumma salli ala Muhammad.
items.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad.
items.src: Quran 33:56; Sunan Abi Dawud 1481; Jami at-Tirmidhi 3477
items.reference: Quran 33:56; Sunan Abi Dawud 1481; Jami at-Tirmidhi 3477
items.grade: Authentic instruction to send Salat before dua; concise wording used as general Salawat
items.timing: Before making dua after praising Allah

items.name: Salawat and Salam Command from Qur’an
items.ar: صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
items.tr: Sallu alayhi wa sallimu taslima.
items.en: Send blessings upon the Prophet and greet the Prophet with peace.
items.rep: Quranic command; recited as Qur’an when reading the verse
items.timing: General reminder and Quranic command regarding Salawat

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ، وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ، وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ
items.tr: Allahummahdini fiman hadayt, wa afini fiman afayt...
items.en: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, grant well-being among those You have granted well-being, and bless what You have given.
items.src: Sunan Abi Dawud / Jami at-Tirmidhi - Qunut

items.ar: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي، وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
items.tr: Rabbishrah li sadri wa yassir li amri.
items.en: My Lord, expand my chest and make my task easy for me.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالسَّدَادَ
items.tr: Allahumma inni as’alukal-huda was-sadad.
items.en: O Allah, guidance and uprightness are asked from You.

items.ar: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ، ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
items.tr: Ya Muqallibal-qulubi, thabbit qalbi ala dinik.
items.en: O Turner of hearts, keep my heart firm upon Your religion.

items.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ، وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ، وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
items.tr: La ilaha illallahul-Azimul-Halim...
items.en: There is none worthy of worship except Allah, the Magnificent, the Forbearing; Lord of the Mighty Throne, the heavens, the earth, and the Noble Throne.

items.ar: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ، أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ، وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ
items.tr: Ya Hayyu ya Qayyum, bi-rahmatika astaghith...
items.en: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer, by Your mercy help is sought. Set all affairs right and do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye.

items.ar: حَسْبُنَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
items.tr: Hasbunallahu wa ni’mal-wakil.
items.en: Allah is sufficient, and He is the best disposer of affairs.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ، وَالْفَقْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.tr: Allahumma afini fi badani, Allahumma afini fi sam’i...
items.en: O Allah, grant well-being in my body, hearing, and sight. Refuge is sought from disbelief, poverty, and punishment of the grave.

items.ar: أَسْأَلُ اللهَ الْعَظِيمَ، رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
items.tr: As’alullahal-Azima Rabbal-Arshil-Azimi an yashfiyak.
items.en: I ask Allah the Magnificent, Lord of the Mighty Throne, to cure you.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ، أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ، اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
items.tr: Allahumma Rabban-nas, adhhib al-ba’s, ishfi Antash-Shafi...
items.en: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm and heal. You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing.

items.ar: أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
items.tr: A’udhu bi-izzatillahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir.
items.en: I seek refuge in the might and power of Allah from the evil of what I feel and fear.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
items.tr: Allahummakfini bi-halalika an haramik, wa aghnini bi-fadlika amman siwak.
items.en: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and enrich me by Your grace from needing anyone besides You.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
items.tr: Allahumma inni as’aluka ilman nafi’an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa amalan mutaqabbala.
items.en: O Allah, beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds are asked from You.

items.ar: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللهِ التَّامَّةِ، مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
items.tr: U’idhukuma bi-kalimatillahit-tammah...
items.en: I seek protection for you both in the perfect words of Allah from every devil, every poisonous creature, and every harmful eye.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي، وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي، وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
items.tr: Allahummanfa’ni bima allamtani wa allimni ma yanfa’uni wa zidni ilma.
items.en: O Allah, benefit me through what You have taught me, teach me what benefits me, and increase me in knowledge.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَعُ، وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ، وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لَا تَشْبَعُ، وَمِنْ دَعْوَةٍ لَا يُسْتَجَابُ لَهَا
items.tr: Allahumma inni a’udhu bika min ilmin la yanfa’...
items.en: O Allah, refuge is sought in You from knowledge that does not benefit, a heart that is not humble, a soul that is not satisfied, and a supplication that is not answered.

items.ar: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا، وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
items.tr: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin...
items.en: Glory be to Him who subjected this to us, and we could not have subdued it. Surely to our Lord we will return.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى
items.tr: Allahumma inna nas’aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa...
items.en: O Allah, righteousness, piety, and deeds pleasing to You are asked in this journey.

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الصَّاحِبُ فِي السَّفَرِ، وَالْخَلِيفَةُ فِي الْأَهْلِ
items.tr: Allahumma Antas-Sahibu fis-safar, wal-Khalifatu fil-ahl.
items.en: O Allah, You are the Companion in travel and the Guardian over the family.

items.ar: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
items.tr: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa alallahi Rabbina tawakkalna.
items.en: In the name of Allah entry is made, in the name of Allah exit is made, and upon Allah our Lord reliance is placed.

items.ar: بِسْمِ اللهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
items.tr: Bismillah, tawakkaltu alallah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
items.en: In the name of Allah, reliance is placed upon Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
items.src: Sunan Abi Dawud / Jami at-Tirmidhi - Leaving home

items.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا، وَرَزَقَنِيهِ، مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
items.tr: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at’amani hadha wa razaqanihi...
items.en: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any power or strength from me.
items.src: Sunan Abi Dawud / Jami at-Tirmidhi - After eating

items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
items.tr: Allahumma ma asbaha bi min ni’matin aw bi-ahadin min khalqik...
items.en: O Allah, whatever blessing has reached me or any of Your creation this morning is from You alone with no partner. To You is praise and thanks.

items.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
items.tr: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi bi-ni’matihi tatimmus-salihat.
items.en: All praise is for Allah by whose favour righteous deeds are completed.
